text:
LA County Public Health - Maternal, Child, & Adolescent Health
Skip to main content
CPSP PROVIDER TRAININGS
CPSP PROVIDER TRAININGS
Below you will find several virtual trainings offered by the
LA County CPSP Team
. Certificates of completion will be made available to download after passing the post-test with a score of
80% or higher
. If you're experiencing trouble navigating the training course page, view the
Frequently Asked Questions
. For additional questions, contact the LA County CPSP Team at
cpsp@ph.lacounty.gov
.
NOTE:
Save and/or print a copy of each training certificate for your records. The LA County CPSP Team will no longer be retaining copies of certificates of completion as of
March 2026
.
PRIVACY NOTE:
Training progress and post-test results are stored locally in your web
 browser.
 Clearing browser data or switching devices may reset your saved progress.
CPSP Program Trainings
The trainings below include an overview of the CPSP program, along with an in-depth
 explanation on how to complete the LA County's protocols and assessment forms.
Nutrition Trainings
The trainings below provide an overview of CPSP nutrition services, including guidance
 on completing nutrition assessments, protocols, and client-centered counseling approaches.
Psychosocial Trainings
The trainings below provide an overview of CPSP psychosocial services, including
 maternal and paternal mental health, psychosocial screening, assessment tools, intimate partner
 violence (IPV), documentation requirements, and referral resources.
Additional Trainings
The following videos provide supplemental education for CPSP providers. These trainings will equip
 CPSP providers with additional education on a variety of perinatal and postpartum health topics that
 will better support CPSP clients/patients.
There will be no certificates issued for viewing these supplemental trainings.
×
